symptom: a knee that has ached for months with mild swelling that will not settle
hook: a cluster of round empty chambers was packed into the end of the bone like a mass of soap bubbles
whatYouSee: A cluster of round lucent chambers packed together at the end of the bone like a mass of soap bubbles.
whyItMatters: A benign but locally aggressive tumor has hollowed out the end of the bone into these bubble-like chambers and can weaken it enough to fracture.
treatment: Surgeons scrape out the tumor and fill the cavity and denosumab can shrink it when surgery is not enough.
takeaway: A bone can look like it is filled with bubbles and still hold your whole body weight.
igOptions: B. A giant cell tumor of bone

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a knee that has ached for months with mild swelling that will not settle.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a cluster of round empty chambers was packed into the end of the bone like a mass of soap bubbles.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Giant cell tumor of bone

👀 What you see:
A cluster of round lucent chambers packed together at the end of the bone like a mass of soap bubbles.

🦴 Why it matters:
A benign but locally aggressive tumor has hollowed out the end of the bone into these bubble-like chambers and can weaken it enough to fracture.

💊 Treatment:

Surgeons scrape out the tumor and fill the cavity and denosumab can shrink it when surgery is not enough.

laypersonQuestion: Does that bone end look hollow to you?
seedHint: Focus on the very tip of the bone and ask yourself if it looks solid or full of holes
